Descrição: This epic covers all functionalities related to user authentication and account management. It enables investors to create accounts, securely access the platform, and manage their personal information.

User Story

As a new investor,
I want to create an account,
So that I can access the StockWise platform.

Story Points: 3

Priority: High

Acceptance Criteria:

* User can enter name, email and password.
* Email must be unique.
* Password must contain at least 8 characters.
* Account is created successfully.
* Success message is displayed.
This epic enables investors to search and discover publicly traded companies, providing access to relevant company information and financial data.

User Story

As a registered investor,
I want to log into the platform,
So that I can access my personalized content.

Story Points: 2

Priority: High

Acceptance Criteria:

* User can log in using email and password.
* Invalid credentials display an error message.
* Successful login redirects the user to the home page.

User Story

As an investor,
I want to view company information,
So that I can better understand the business before investing.

Story Points: 5

Priority: High

Acceptance Criteria:

* Company name is displayed.
* Sector and industry information are displayed.
* Company description is displayed.
* Information is updated when another company is selected.
This epic provides investors with financial indicators and automated analysis tools that support investment decision-making.

User Story

As an investor,
I want to search for a stock by ticker symbol,
So that I can quickly access company information.

Story Points: 5

Priority: High

Acceptance Criteria:

* User can search using ticker symbols.
* Matching companies are displayed.
* Invalid searches return a user-friendly message.

User Story

As an investor,
I want to receive a financial health score,
So that I can quickly assess a company's quality.

Story Points: 13

Priority: High

Acceptance Criteria:

* Score is automatically calculated.
* Score is displayed on the company page.
* Score methodology is documented.
* Users can understand the meaning of the score.
This epic provides educational content that helps beginner investors understand financial concepts and improve investment knowledge.

User Story

As an investor,
I want to view key financial indicators,
So that I can evaluate a company's financial health.

Story Points: 8

Priority: High

Acceptance Criteria:

* ROE is displayed.
* P/E Ratio is displayed.
* Dividend Yield is displayed.
* Debt Ratio is displayed.
* Indicators are updated for the selected company.

User Story

As a beginner investor,
I want explanations for financial indicators,
So that I can understand their meaning.

Story Points: 2

Priority: Medium

Acceptance Criteria:

* Tooltips are available for key indicators.
* Explanations are clear and concise.
* Tooltip appears when the user hovers or clicks the indicator.

User Story

As a beginner investor,
I want to read educational articles,
So that I can improve my financial knowledge.

Story Points: 3

Priority: Medium

Acceptance Criteria:

* Articles are displayed correctly.
* Articles are categorized by topic.
* Users can open and read articles.
This epic improves user retention by providing monitoring and tracking features for stocks and market performance.

User Story

As a beginner investor,
I want access to educational content,
So that I can learn about stock market fundamentals.

Story Points: 5

Priority: Medium

Acceptance Criteria:

* Educational content is organized by topic.
* Users can access learning materials.
* Navigation is simple and intuitive.

User Story

As an investor,
I want to view historical performance charts,
So that I can analyze company performance over time.

Story Points: 8

Priority: Medium

Acceptance Criteria:

* Historical data is displayed.
* User can select different time periods.
* Charts are displayed correctly.
This epic contains advanced analysis features intended for experienced investors and future platform enhancements.

User Story

As an investor,
I want to save stocks to a watchlist,
So that I can monitor them later.

Story Points: 5

Priority: Medium

Acceptance Criteria:

* User can add stocks to the watchlist.
* User can remove stocks from the watchlist.
* Watchlist is saved to the user's account.

User Story

As an investor,
I want to export analysis reports to PDF,
So that I can save and share information.

Story Points: 3

Priority: Low

Acceptance Criteria:

* User can export reports to PDF.
* PDF contains company information and indicators.
* Generated PDF is properly formatted.

User Story

As an investor,
I want to compare multiple companies,
So that I can identify the best investment opportunities.

Story Points: 13

Priority: Low

Acceptance Criteria:

* User can select multiple companies.
* Financial indicators are displayed side-by-side.
* Comparison results are clearly presented.
